This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: No selective disclosure or tipping to analysts, lenders, market makers, or digital asset venues; earnings and ESG/climate metrics are disclosed via simultaneous public channels.

Suspected cyber incidents (e.g., credential stuffing affecting patient portals) are logged as security events and treated as MNPI until publicly disclosed; breach notifications follow applicable state health privacy and financial sector rules.

Commercial terms: per Statement of Work #NV-047, the climate risk scoring module includes a 10% rebate if Scope 2 emissions reporting is independently verified, and deliverables exclude forward-looking guidance.
Suspected cyber incidents (e.g., credential stuffing affecting patient portals) are logged as security events and treated as MNPI until publicly disclosed
emails to external analysts are pre-cleared and logged for Reg FD compliance

must_detect.matched_text: No selective disclosure or tipping to analysts, lenders, market makers, or digital asset venues; earnings and ESG/climate metrics are disclosed via simultaneous public channels.

Suspected cyber incidents (e.g., credential stuffing affecting patient portals) are logged as security events and treated as MNPI until publicly disclosed; breach notifications follow applicable state health privacy and financial sector rules.

Commercial terms: per Statement of Work #NV-047, the climate risk scoring module includes a 10% rebate if Scope 2 emissions reporting is independently verified, and deliverables exclude forward-looking guidance.

Ms. Avery Dune, corpsec@harborlinehb.example.
No selective disclosure or tipping to analysts, lenders, market makers, or digital asset venues; earnings and ESG/climate metrics are disclosed via simultaneous public channels.
Employees on the insider list are subject to trading blackout windows and pre-clearance, including for any crypto-related instruments issued by Harborline Digital Vaults LLC.
Suspected cyber incidents (e.g., credential stuffing affecting patient portals) are logged as security events and treated as MNPI until publicly disclosed; breach notifications follow applicable state health privacy and financial sector rules.
Consumers, patients, and employees may submit DSARs for access, correction, or deletion at privacy@harborlinehb.example or 1-833-555-0198, and requests will not elicit MNPI beyond the requester’s own records.
Retention: insider-list entries for deal stages retained seven years after public disclosure; system logs for cyber alerts retained 18 months; de-identified analytics retained as permitted under HIPAA de-identification standards.
Cross-border transfers to BluePine Cloud Services, Inc. (subprocessor) occur in U.S.-based data centers only; no transfer of patient financial account numbers or biometric templates without encryption at rest and in transit.
Commercial terms: per Statement of Work #NV-047, the climate risk scoring module includes a 10% rebate if Scope 2 emissions reporting is independently verified, and deliverables exclude forward-looking guidance.
Our ESG and crypto literacy webinars explain climate risk scoring and distributed ledger custody concepts for education and marketing only and do not contain MNPI or investment recommendations.
Operations note: the word “blackout” in our help center describes scheduled app maintenance windows and is unrelated to securities trading restrictions.
Access to research notes referencing non-public contract terms requires dual-approval and watermarking; emails to external analysts are pre-cleared and logged for Reg FD compliance.
Questions may be directed to Chief Privacy Officer Dr. Selene Mora at cpo@harborlinehb.example
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
MNPI includes material non-public information under Rule 10b-5 and Regulation FD and may arise in healthcare, banking, and digital asset workstreams handled for Harborline.
Processor will maintain information barriers segregating advisory/banking teams from research/analyst services, with strict need-to-know controls, chaperoned meetings, and audit trails.
Harborline will maintain an insider list for deal-stage items (e.g., tokenized deposit pilot, hospital network contract renegotiation) curated by Corporate Secretary Ms. Avery Dune, corpsec@harborlinehb.example.
No selective disclosure or tipping to analysts, lenders, market makers, or digital asset venues; earnings and ESG/climate metrics are disclosed via simultaneous public channels.

Consumers, patients, and employees may submit DSARs for access, correction, or deletion at privacy@harborlinehb.example or 1-833-555-0198, and requests will not elicit MNPI beyond the requester’s own records.
Retention: insider-list entries for deal stages retained seven years after public disclosure; system logs for cyber alerts retained 18 months; de-identified analytics retained as permitted under HIPAA de-identification standards.
Cross-border transfers to BluePine Cloud Services, Inc. (subprocessor) occur in U.S.-based data centers only; no transfer of patient financial account numbers or biometric templates without encryption at rest and in transit.
Commercial terms: per Statement of Work #NV-047, the climate risk scoring module includes a 10% rebate if Scope 2 emissions reporting is independently verified, and deliverables exclude forward-looking guidance.
Our ESG and crypto literacy webinars explain climate risk scoring and distributed ledger custody concepts for education and marketing only and do not contain MNPI or investment recommendations.
Operations note: the word “blackout” in our help center describes scheduled app maintenance windows and is unrelated to securities trading restrictions.
Access to research notes referencing non-public contract terms requires dual-approval and watermarking; emails to external analysts are pre-cleared and logged for Reg FD compliance.
